text.title: WTP Survey Questionnaire Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid report artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner is plural pronoun (or generic group); required fields empty or missing.

forbidden.pattern: `owner` is a plural pronoun (`team`, `we`, `us`, `everyone`, `engineering`) or empty string
